sections.heading: Steps to Delete Your Account
content: Note: After deletion, your account data will be retained for 30 days for security and recovery purposes. After 30 days, all data will be permanently removed.

sections.heading: How to Delete Your Account:
content: 1. Log in using the Account you want to Delete.
2. Go to Settings from your Profile page.
6. Tap the confirmation box to enable the "Delete Account" button.
7. Press "Delete Account" to permanently delete your account.
